'''Handa''' was a [[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] during the last [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the [[New Sith Wars]]. He [[Jedi training/Legends|instructed]] multiple [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]], including the [[Human/Legends|Humans]] [[Githany]] and [[Kiel Charny]], who developed a romantic relationship with each other. Handa eventually learned of his students' involvement with each other and forbade the two from continuing it, causing Githany to defect to [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Skere Kaan]]'s [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]]. Both of Handa's former Padawans were [[Death/Legends|slain]] during the [[Ruusan campaign]], which saw the [[Seventh Battle of Ruusan|defeat]] of Kaan's Brotherhood.

==Biography==
Handa, a [[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|sensitive]] to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] as a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]]<ref name="DB: PoD" /> of the [[Republic Dark Age]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> During the [[New Sith Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], Handa ascended to the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and trained multiple Jedi as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]]. The Cathar tutored the [[Human/Legends|Humans]] [[Githany]] and [[Kiel Charny]] simultaneously. During Handa's tenure as their Master, he would warn the two against giving into their emotions and forming a romantic attachment toward each other, which violated the tenets of the [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Code]]. When Githany's mind built up psychiatric barriers that prevented her from using the Force—due to her inability to cope with the vastness of the Force—Handa helped his Padawan regain her connection to it.<ref name="DB: PoD" />

[[File:Githany_lightwhip.jpg|thumb|right|220px|Two of Handa's Padawans, Kiel Charny and Githany, both died during the Ruusan campaign.]]
Eventually, Handa learned that Githany and Charny had begun a romance with each other. Angered, the Cathar Jedi Master forbade the two from continuing their relationship. Because of Handa's reaction toward them, Githany abandoned the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and join the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]], led by [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]]<ref name="DB: PoD" /> [[Skere Kaan]].<ref name="EGTW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> Charny remained with the Jedi and served as a [[Jedi General/Legends|general]] in [[Jedi Lord]] [[Hoth (Jedi Lord)|Hoth's]] [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] during the [[Ruusan campaign]]. Both of Handa's former Padawans [[Death/Legends|died]] during the conflict on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]]: Charny was slain by Githany,<ref name="JvS 4">[[Jedi vs. Sith 4|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 4]]</ref> who was in turn killed when Kaan activated a [[thought bomb]] during the [[Seventh Battle of Ruusan|war's final battle]], which obliterated the Brotherhood and most of Hoth's Jedi forces.<ref name="DB: PoD" />

==Personality and traits==
Handa was careful to remind his students about giving into their emotions. Upon discovering Charny's and Githany's romance, the Cather Jedi was angered and forbade the two from continuing it.<ref name="DB: PoD" />

==Powers and abilities==
Handa was sensitive to the Force and was capable enough to ascend to the rank of Jedi Master.<ref name="DB: PoD" />

==Behind the scenes==
Handa was mentioned in the [[2006]] novel ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'', written by [[Drew Karpyshyn]]. He garnered an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', released in [[2008]].
